title: syringa komarowii var. reflexa
intro: Syringa komarowii var. reflexa, also known as the Korean lilac, is a species of flowering plant native to China and Korea. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Syringa komarowii var. reflexa include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and possess antioxidant properties. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its essential oil is used in herbal remedies to treat various health conditions.
